treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Pegasys 90 mcg a week and Ribavirin 200 mg a day
treatment_information.treatment_response: Most recent viral load was <43 copies, down from over 15 million
Consistent with recurrent viral hepatitis C, no rejection of transplant liver

treatment_timeline.event: Medication adjustments made - Ribavirin stopped, Pegasys continued

patient_outcome.final_status: Improved kidney function and responded well to treatment
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Appointment to be set up in the transplant clinic for unspecified date
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient has weekly headaches and malaise following Pegasys injections
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Expressed the need to stay hydrated post-discharge
